name: pdf-summarise-v015
description: Extract text from a document, ask an Ollama-served LLM to summarise, sanitise the model output (built into the ollama_chat tool), write the summary to disk. Default model is minimax-m2.7:cloud; pass any other Ollama tag via the model input.

model.description: Ollama model tag. Cloud-served use the :cloud suffix (ollama signin required). Recommended cloud: minimax-m2.7:cloud (default), mistral-large-3:675b-cloud, qwen3-coder-next:cloud. Local: mistral:latest, magistral:latest, jan-code:latest.

system_prompt.default:
<role>
You are a careful, factual summariser.
</role>
<constraints>
- Produce exactly five bullet points.
- Each bullet is one sentence.
- Do not add information that is not in the source document.
- If a claim is not supported by the source, omit it; do not speculate.
</constraints>

with.prompt:
<task>
Summarise the document below in five bullet points.
</task>

<document>
${steps.extract.content}
</document>

<output_format>
Return only the five bullet points, in markdown, each on its own line starting with "- ". No preamble, no closing remarks.
</output_format>

with.text: Document summarised by the LLM; output sanitised on the way back.
